name: baseline-recipe-selection
description: Bundled baseline recipe selection tool backed by local recipe export JSON files.

tools.name: baseline_recipe_selection
tools.description: Select ranked baseline recipes from local historical recipe export JSON. Use for baseline recipe selection, explainable historical ranking, material-plus-test similarity ranking, and returning detailed normalized experiment records instead of only baseline IDs.

action.description: Operation to run. Defaults to schema when omitted.

material_groups.description: Preferred resin and hardener material pools.

test_constraints.description: Record of test constraints keyed by test name. Values support a single constraint object or a temperature-indexed map of constraint objects.

expert_opinion.description: Optional expert text used to infer allowed hardener system families.

ranking_priority.description: Optional ranking order for test constraints.

top_k.description: Maximum number of ranked baseline recipes to return. Defaults to 5.

export_path.description: Optional local path to a merged recipe export JSON or a directory containing resin/hardener/mixture/mechanics raw export JSON files.
